message:
style(core,db,tools,share): rustfmt and minor test assertion fixes

Apply rustfmt formatting across test modules in multiple crates.
The changes are purely cosmetic line-wrapping and indentation with
two functional micro-fixes:

- core/conformal.rs: fix misaligned comment indentation on tan mapping
- core/setup.rs: reflow long assert_eq! chains to idiomatic multi-line
- core/disk.rs, flake_triage.rs, memory.rs: reformat assert macros
- db/retry.rs: replace exact f64 equality (assert_eq!(x, 0.0)) with
  epsilon-based assert!(x <= f64::EPSILON) to avoid floating-point
  flakiness; use Duration::from_mins(5) instead of from_secs(300)
- db/mail_explorer.rs, search_v3.rs: reflow long lines in test helpers
- server/static_files.rs: reformat mime_type assertion chains
- share/wizard.rs: collapse short assert_eq! onto single lines
- tools/reservation_index.rs: collapse vec![(..)] into single lines

No behavioral changes; all existing tests pass identically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
